title: Day 8 Writing Exercise — Will Have
instructions: नीचे दिए गए prompts के आधार पर अपने शब्दों में English में लिखें।

tasks.prompt: Write 5 sentences about your future goals using 'will have'.
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपने future goals के बारे में 5 sentences 'will have' का इस्तेमाल करके लिखें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: By next year, I will have completed my certification. By 2028, I will have started my own business. By 30, I will have bought my own house. By June, I will have learned fluent English. By next month, I will have finished this course.

tasks.prompt: Write a short professional email using Future Perfect about a project deadline.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Future Perfect का इस्तेमाल करते हुए एक project deadline के बारे में professional email लिखें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Dear Team, By Friday, we will have completed the testing phase and submitted the final report. Please let me know if you have any concerns before then. Regards.

tasks.prompt: Write your 5-year career plan using will have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपना 5-साल का career plan 'will have' का इस्तेमाल करते हुए लिखें।
